channel.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Mar 25th, 2021
item.description:
Articles

  • Using Next.js with FaunaDB: How to Query the Database from Your App

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Mar 17th, 2021
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • superplatestars966 - superplate creates Next.js app in seconds with TypeScript, styled-components, SWR, Storybook, and 35+ plugin.

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Feb 26th, 2021
item.description:
Articles

  • Adding code snippets to Next.js using react-syntax-highlighter

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Feb 3rd, 2021
item.description:
Articles

  • Next on Next.js

    • Boilerplates

  • next-postgres-graphql - Create SSR Next.js websites using GraphQL with Postgres (Next.js, Postgres, GraphQL)

    • Apps

  • njt.now.sh - npm jump to 🐸 (package navigation shortcuts you dreamed about). Partially statically-rendered, partially deployed as lambda. Automatically updated on each commit to the github repostars183, thanks to Now integration.

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Jan 19th, 2021
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • Sitemap generator for NextJS & StrAPIstars1 - 🦾 An additional server on express that runs alongside nextjs and regenerates sitemap ( with index sitemap ) and robots.txt files on request from STR API.

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Jan 4th, 2021
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • nextjs-starterstars304 - An SEO Optimized Next.js 10 starter kit template with React 17 + Typescript + Tailwind CSS 2 + React Query 3 + (GitHub Auth + Passwordless Auth) using (NextAuth.js and Fauna DB), ESLint, Prettier, Pre-commit hook with Husky. Can have different layouts for different pages.

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Jan 1st, 2021
item.description:
Extensions

  • next-transpile-modulesstars577 - Next.js plugin to transpile code from node_modules. Useful for monorepos.

item.description:

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Aug 19th, 2020
item.description:
Boilerplates

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Aug 15th, 2020
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • next-boilerplatestars997 - A well-structured production ready Next.js boilerplate with Typescript, Redux, Express.js, Sass, Css, EnvConfig, Reverse Proxy, Bundle
  • Next-Postgres-With-Typescriptstars9 - Forum-like fullstack web app with Next 7.0.2 + Sequelize 4/Postgres + Typescript + Redux + Passport Local Auth + Emotion
  • Nextjs Blog Starter - 🚀 The perfect starter code for your blog based on Next.js framework. ⚡️ Made with Next.js, TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier, PostCSS, Tailwind CSS.

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs May 19th, 2020
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • The Knests Stackstars171 - Full stack boilerplate/hackathon starter with: PostgreSQL, Knex.js, NestJS, Next.js (obviously), GraphQL, React (with hooks and typescript), Material-UI, Docker multistage images for, Docker compose and a Gitlab CI/CD pipeline fully configured.

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs May 10th, 2020
item.description:
Essentials

  • Vercel TV

    • Articles

  • 5 (of the Many Reasons) to love Vercel's Next.js

    • Boilerplates

  • Next Right Nowstars752 - Flexible production-grade boilerplate with Next.js 9 and Vercel, with pre-configured Sentry, cookies, Amplitude, Emotion, FontAwesome, GraphQL/GraphCMS (Apollo), Bootstrap (Reactstrap), i18next (Locize), Jest, Cypress (E2E tests) and CI/CD (GH Actions), with full TypeScript support and support for B2B multi-tenants web apps (monorepo)
  • Next & Vercel Typescript templatestars22 - Serverless, Typescript, Jest, Github CI, SCSS, prettier boilerplate

item.title: unicodeveloper/awesome-nextjs Jul 18th, 2017
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • Next Simple Starterstars776 - Simple PWA boilerplate with Next.js and Redux.
  • NextJS Starterstars1.3k - Starter project for Next.js with and email and oAuth authentication.
  • Next Simple Blogstars532 - Simple Markdown based blog built with Next.js with static exports.

    • Apps

  • NextJS GOTstars27 - Simple Next.js application that showcases Game of Thrones Characters.
  • Relatestars326 - Mindfulness community - React, GraphQL, Next.js.
  • Passwordstars110 - One password, right way.
  • Next Todosstars120 - Todo list written in Next.js.
  • Hacker Newsstars41 - Another Hacker News written in Next.js.
  • Jet Chatstars7 - Jet and Next.js powered Chat demo.
  • Nextgramstars47 - Sample Next.js v2 app for showing off its capabilities.
  • Rauchg Blogstars657 - Blog built by a Next.js core maintainer.
  • Next JPHstars33 - JsonPlaceholder sample app made with Next.js.
  • Mailtostars111 - HTML mailto's made easy.
  • Platestars45 - The task management app to rule them all.
  • Dashboardstars1k - Create your own team dashboard with custom widgets.
